visual_summary: A bright and shimmering button with a 3D appearance, commonly used for primary calls-to-action in user interfaces.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Shiny Button Demo
Description: A bright and shimmering button with a 3D appearance, commonly used for primary calls-to-action in user interfaces.
Style: glassmorphism, 3d
Interactions: hoverable, clickable, animated
Tags: shiny, button, magicui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { ShinyButton } from "@/registry/magicui/shiny-button"

export default function ShinyButtonDemo() {
  return <ShinyButton>Shiny Button</ShinyButton>
}
